attacking_style: Pure sprinter who waits until final 200-300m to launch, occasionally showing unexpected ability to finish uphill or technical finishes when positioning succeeds. Does not initiate attacks; relies on final sprint punch.
team_tactics: Groupama-FDJ attempts early leadouts from 2-4km out with mixed success; Démare often forced to position independently in technical finales. Team harvests intermediate sprint points strategically for points classification rather than controlling full leadout.
terrain_preference: Performs best on flat bunch sprints with clean run-ins. Surprisingly capable on short uphill finishes (1km climbs) and wet cobbles when positioned well. Struggles on technical, dangerous finishes and stages with even gentle climbs inside final 5km.
vulnerability: Poor positioning discipline causes him to be caught too far back (documented 4+ times) or dropped by tempo before finale. Loses to pure sprinters (Kittel, Ewan) in head-to-head speed contests. Fails to check for screened threats after controlling approach.
key_patterns: Caught too far back in disrupted/technical finales despite top-tier speed, recurring positioning failures (2017-2023)
Dropped by sustained tempo before sprint despite flat terrain, positioning discipline issue not fitness (3 instances)
Team controls from distance but leadout dissolves, forcing independent positioning in final 500m (5+ races)
Strategic intermediate sprint point collection for classification rather than stage wins (multiple Giro 2019-2020)
Wins chaotic/reduced sprints better than pure organized bunch kicks, benefits from disruption eliminating faster rivals
Surprisingly strong on 1km uphill finishes and technical cobbles, exceeding 'pure sprinter' label (3 victories)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Paris-Nice showed first failed sprint of week with declining ability on technical finishes; 2022 self-described 'disappointing season' with pressure-induced tactical errors; peak performance was 2019-2020 Giro campaigns
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5
